items.myth: Anthropic was a consumer chat company from day one in 2021.
items.reality: Early years emphasized safety research and controlled access; broader Claude API and claude.ai adoption accelerated in the 2022–2023 window.
items.example: A learner timeline should place founding (2021) before wide public chat—not assume claude.ai existed at incorporation.

items.myth: Constitutional AI instantly solved alignment, so later safety work became unnecessary.
items.reality: Constitutional AI introduced an influential training direction; ongoing evals, red teaming, and policy updates still matter as models and threats evolve.
items.example: Even after Constitutional AI publications, Anthropic continues harmlessness evals and Usage Policy updates—capability scaling does not freeze risk.
